## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Title format

The PR title must follow Conventional Commits, for example `feat: add mondo source`.
Allowed types: build, chore, ci, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, release, style, test.

## Testing

Explain how you verified the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name uses a `feat/`, `fix/`, or `chore/` prefix.
- [ ] `prek run --all-files` passes locally.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets or generated files committed.
